hero.title: Open a ticket and keep the thread in one place.
hero.subtitle: Use this page for website bugs, account issues, feature requests, and business follow-up.
hero.loginAction: Log in to open a ticket

panel.title: Ticket handling
panel.body: Once submitted, replies, attachments, and status changes stay together in a single thread.

highlights.threadDescription: Follow-up details, support replies, and status updates stay in one place.
highlights.verificationDescription: Submissions and replies are verified, and attachments are ownership-checked.

categories.title: Common request types
categories.subtitle: Pick the closest category first, then add details and attachments.

help.loginNotice: Sign in to create tickets, upload attachments, and keep track of replies.
help.recentGuest: Sign in to view recent tickets and status updates.
